title: adenia wightiana subsp. wightiana
intro: Adenia wightiana subsp. wightiana, commonly known as the Indian cucumber tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Passifloraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Adenia wightiana subsp. wightiana include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antimicrobial agent, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
